name: California Coast Credit Union Clairemont Branch
description_short: California Coast Credit Union's Clairemont branch is a full-service credit union location in San Diego offering checking, savings, loans, and ATM services to members in eight Southern California counties.
description_long:
California Coast Credit Union operates as a federally-chartered credit union serving members across San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, and San Bernardino counties. The Clairemont Branch, located at 4265 Genesee Avenue in San Diego, serves as a full-service location offering comprehensive financial products and member support.

The branch provides a range of consumer and business financial services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, credit cards, and business accounts. Members have access to fee-free ATM withdrawals at 24-hour drive-up and walk-up ATMs, cashier's check services, and in-person account opening assistance. The credit union publishes rates for all major products across their website, allowing members to compare offerings.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, California Coast emphasizes member ownership and community service. The Clairemont branch hosts community workshops, such as their advertised elder abuse prevention seminar, and provides financial wellness resources. The institution maintains NMLS ID# 407951 and operates under ABA/Routing Number 322281578. Their accessibility features include wheelchair access at the Clairemont location.

The Clairemont branch operates limited hours (9am-5pm Monday-Thursday, 9am-6pm Friday, 9am-2pm Saturday), which may not accommodate all member schedules. While the branch offers standard credit union services competitively, the specific rate offerings and loan terms are not detailed on the branch page itself, requiring members to check the rates section or contact the branch directly for pricing information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fee-free ATM withdrawals at 24-hour drive-up and walk-up ATMs
Full-service branch offering account opening, loan applications, and business account setup in person
Free cashier's checks (one per day) with valid government ID
Community-focused programming including financial wellness workshops
Serves eight Southern California counties for membership eligibility
Published rates available for savings, checking, certificates, IRAs, home loans, personal loans, credit cards, and auto loans
cons: Limited branch hours (closes at 5pm weekdays, 2pm Saturday) may not suit all schedules
Specific interest rates and loan terms not displayed on branch page—requires contacting branch or visiting rates section
Single branch location in Clairemont may require travel for some members in service area
No detailed information on minimum balance requirements, fees, or account terms on the branch page
best_for: San Diego County residents and workers seeking a full-service credit union with in-person branch support
Members across eight Southern California counties wanting fee-free ATM access and community banking services
Individuals and small business owners needing comprehensive loan products from a credit union lender
Consumers interested in credit union membership benefits and community engagement programs
diagnosis: California Coast Credit Union's Clairemont branch is best for San Diego County residents and workers throughout eight Southern California counties who want a traditional credit union banking relationship with in-person service, fee-free ATM access, and competitive loan products. The main caveat is that specific rates, fees, and terms are not displayed on the branch page itself, requiring direct contact with the branch to compare offerings.
services: Cash and check deposit at ATMs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
